name: Intel ISEF Awards (now Regeneron ISEF)
amount: Grand awards vary up to $75,000 plus special awards

eligibility.citizenship: Varies by affiliated fair; U.S. and international participants
eligibility.other_requirements: Must advance through affiliated local/regional science fair

stackable_notes: Prize awards generally stack; institutional aid usually unaffected.
notes: Pipeline competition via affiliated fairs; not direct open application.
